requirement_topic.en: Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval (RAK)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电/电信终端设备型式核准（RAK）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電/電信終端設備型式核准（RAK）

summary.en: All radio equipment and telecom terminal equipment placed on the Bosnia and Herzegovina market requires a mandatory RAK type approval certificate under BiH's Law on Communications (Zakon o komunikacijama). RAK (Regulatorna agencija za komunikacije) is the state-level NRA covering radio spectrum, type approval, and telecom terminal equipment. CE Declaration of Conformity, CCC, or FCC approvals alone are NOT accepted as substitutes for RAK certification. BiH aligns with EN/ETSI standards as an EU accession candidate, and EN/ETSI-based test reports are accepted as technical evidence in RAK applications, providing a 'CE-lite' pathway — test to EN/ETSI standards, then obtain a separate RAK certificate. BiH's complex entity governance (Republika Srpska entity and Federation of BiH entity, plus Brčko District) requires attention, but RAK operates at the state (BiH) level for type approval, providing a single national framework. CCC is not recognised in BiH.
summary.zh: 在波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那市场销售的所有无线电设备和电信终端设备，须依据波黑《通信法》（Zakon o komunikacijama）取得RAK（通信监管局）强制型式核准证书。RAK是负责无线电频谱、型式核准和电信终端设备的国家级监管机构。CE符合性声明、CCC或FCC核准单独均不能替代RAK认证。波黑作为欧盟入盟候选国与EN/ETSI标准对标，基于EN/ETSI的检测报告可作为RAK申请的技术证明，形成「类CE」路径：按EN/ETSI标准测试，再另行取得RAK证书。波黑复杂的实体治理架构（塞族共和国、波黑联邦及布尔奇科区）需予关注，但RAK在国家（波黑）层面统一管理型式核准，提供统一的国家框架。CCC认证在波黑不被认可。
summary.zht: 在波士尼亞與赫塞哥維納市場銷售的所有無線電設備和電信終端設備，須依據波黑《通訊法》（Zakon o komunikacijama）取得RAK（通訊監管局）強制型式核准證書。RAK是負責無線電頻譜、型式核准和電信終端設備的國家級監管機構。CE符合性聲明、CCC或FCC核准單獨均不能替代RAK認證。波黑作為歐盟入盟候選國與EN/ETSI標準對標，基於EN/ETSI的測試報告可作為RAK申請的技術證明，形成「類CE」路徑：按EN/ETSI標準測試，再另行取得RAK證書。波黑複雜的實體治理架構（塞族共和國、波黑聯邦及布爾奇科區）需予關注，但RAK在國家（波黑）層面統一管理型式核准，提供統一的國家框架。CCC認證在波黑不被認可。

standards_or_laws: Law on Communications of Bosnia and Herzegovina (Zakon o komunikacijama, Official Gazette of BiH No. 31/03, 75/06, 32/10, 98/12)
RAK Rulebook on Type Approval of Radio Equipment and Telecom Terminal Equipment
EN 300 328 V2.2.2 (2.4 GHz Wi-Fi / BT wideband data)

summary.en: China requires SRRC radio type approval (MIIT) for all intentional radio transmitters and a separate MIIT Network Access License (NAL / 进网许可证) for telecom terminal equipment connected to public networks. Applicable GB standards include GB/T 9254.1-2021 and GB 17625.1-2022 for EMC. CCC applies to in-scope products under the RF / electrical safety catalogue.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有有意无线电发射设备取得工业和信息化部下属无线电管理局（SRRC）无线电型式核准，接入公共网络的电信终端设备须另行取得工业和信息化部进网许可证（NAL）。电磁兼容适用GB标准（GB/T 9254.1-2021、GB 17625.1-2022）。目录内产品须取得CCC认证（涵盖射频/电气安全）。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有有意無線電發射設備取得工業和信息化部下屬無線電管理局（SRRC）無線電型式核准，接入公共網路的電信終端設備須另行取得工業和信息化部進網許可證（NAL）。電磁相容適用GB標準（GB/T 9254.1-2021、GB 17625.1-2022）。目錄內產品須取得CCC認證（涵蓋射頻/電氣安全）。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval — 无线电发射设备型号核准 (MIIT Order No. 14, 2019)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — 电信设备进网许可管理办法 (MIIT Order No. 2, 2017)
GB/T 9254.1-2021 (Information technology equipment — radio disturbance characteristics)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (GB 4943.1, GB 9254 scope)

gap.en: A new RAK type approval certificate is required for Bosnia and Herzegovina — SRRC approval, CCC, and FCC marks are not recognised. EN/ETSI test reports generated for CE marking can be reused in the RAK application to avoid duplicative radio and EMC testing, but cannot substitute the certificate itself. BiH entity-level governance adds complexity: confirm with RAK whether entity-level supplementary filings are required alongside the state-level certificate for Republika Srpska or Federation of BiH jurisdictions.
gap.zh: 波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那要求重新取得RAK型式核准证书，SRRC核准、CCC及FCC标志均不被认可。为CE标志生成的EN/ETSI检测报告可在RAK申请中复用，以避免重复的无线电和电磁兼容测试，但不能替代证书本身。波黑实体层级治理增加了复杂性：请向RAK确认，除国家层面证书外，是否还需针对塞族共和国或波黑联邦管辖区提交实体层面的补充申报。
gap.zht: 波士尼亞與赫塞哥維納要求重新取得RAK型式核准證書，SRRC核准、CCC及FCC標誌均不被認可。為CE標誌生成的EN/ETSI測試報告可在RAK申請中複用，以避免重複的無線電和電磁相容測試，但不能替代證書本身。波黑實體層級治理增加了複雜性：請向RAK確認，除國家層面證書外，是否還需針對塞族共和國或波黑聯邦管轄區提交實體層面的補充申報。

source.publisher: RAK — Regulatory Agency for Communications of Bosnia and Herzegovina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A separate RAK type approval certificate is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment placed on the Bosnia and Herzegovina market. CE DoC, CCC, and FCC approvals alone are not sufficient. EN/ETSI test data generated for EU/CE purposes may be reused in the RAK application but does not substitute for the RAK certificate. CCC is not recognised. BiH entity governance complexity should be verified with RAK or a qualified local representative before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那市场销售的所有无线电和电信终端设备，强制要求另行取得RAK型式核准证书。CE符合性声明、CCC及FCC核准单独均不满足要求。为欧盟/CE目的生成的EN/ETSI测试数据可在RAK申请中复用，但不能替代RAK证书。CCC认证不被认可。投放市场前，请向RAK或合格本地代表核实波黑实体治理的复杂性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在波士尼亞與赫塞哥維納市場銷售的所有無線電和電信終端設備，強制要求另行取得RAK型式核准證書。CE符合性聲明、CCC及FCC核准單獨均不滿足要求。為歐盟/CE目的生成的EN/ETSI測試數據可在RAK申請中複用，但不能替代RAK證書。CCC認證不被認可。投放市場前，請向RAK或合格本地代表核實波黑實體治理的複雜性。
